concept: Papa's Burgeria To Go! is a time-management cooking game where players manage a burger joint, taking customer orders and preparing burgers through a multi-station workflow of grilling patties, assembling toppings, and serving. Gameplay is divided into distinct stations (Order, Grill, Build), navigated via on-screen tabs, where players use drag-and-drop, tapping, and swiping gestures to precisely cook patties to desired doneness and assemble burgers against a customer patience timer.
name: Papa's Burgeria To Go!
